# Generated by ollama (starcoder2)
# Prompt: Write a Deployment Manager template for a complete GCP application stack (Compute Engine, Cloud SQL, Cloud Storage, Load Balancer). Focus on core infrastructure. Skip Cloud Logging and Monitoring configuration to reduce complexity in our initial MVP deployment.
# Category: cloud_monitoring

---
apiVersion: compute.cnrm.cloud.google.com/v1beta1
kind: ComputeInstanceTemplate
metadata:
  name: instance-template-for-app-stack
spec:
  location: europe-west3-a # Change to your preferred zone
  machineType: n1-standard-2
  metadata:
    items:
      - key: startup-script
        value: |
          #!/bin/bash

          apt update && apt install -y nginx

          echo "Hello World" > /var/www/html/index.html
---
apiVersion: compute.cnrm.cloud.google.com/v1beta1
kind: ComputeInstanceGroupManager
metadata:
  name: instance-group-manager-for-app-stack
spec:
  baseInstanceName: app-stack # Change to your preferred name prefix
  instanceTemplateRef:
    name: instance-template-for-app-stack
  zone: europe-west3-a # Change to your preferred zone
---
apiVersion: compute.cnrm.cloud.google.com/v1beta1
kind: ComputeNetwork
metadata:
  name: network-for-app-stack
spec: {}
---
apiVersion: compute.cnrm.cloud.google.com/v1beta1
kind: ComputeSubnetwork
metadata:
  name: subnetwork-for-app-stack # Change to your preferred name prefix
spec:
  region: europe-west3 # Change to your preferred zone
  networkRef:
    name: network-for-app-stack
  ipCidrRange: 10.240.0.0/16 # Change to your preferred CIDR range
---
apiVersion: compute.cnrm.cloud.google.com/v1beta1
kind: ComputeFirewall
metadata:
  name: firewall-for-app-stack # Change to your preferred name prefix
spec:
  networkRef:
    name: network-for-app-stack
  sourceRanges: ["0.0.0.0/0"]
  allowed:
    - IPProtocol: TCP
      ports:
        - 80
---
apiVersion: compute.cnrm.cloud.google.com/v1beta1
kind: ComputeForwardingRule
metadata:
  name: forwarding-rule-for-app-stack # Change to your preferred name prefix
spec:
  ipAddress: auto
  target:
    kind: compute.cnrm.cloud.google.com/ComputeInstanceGroupManager
    name: instance-group-manager-for-app-stack
  portRange: 80
---
apiVersion: sqladmin.cnrm.cloud.google.com/v1beta1
kind: SQLDatabaseInstance
metadata:
  name: database-instance-for-app-stack # Change to your preferred name prefix
spec:
  region: europe-west3 # Change to your preferred zone
  settings:
    tier: db-f1-micro
    dataDiskType: PD_SSD
    dataDiskSizeGb: 50
    rootPassword: <PASSWORD> # Change to your preferred password
  databaseVersion: MYSQL_8_0
---
apiVersion: storage.cnrm.cloud.google.com/v1beta1
kind: StorageBucket
metadata:
  name: bucket-for-app-stack # Change to your preferred name prefix
spec: {}
---
apiVersion: storage.cnrm.cloud.google.com/v1beta1
kind: StorageBucketObject
metadata:
  name: object-for-app-stack # Change to your preferred name prefix
spec:
  bucketRef:
    name: bucket-for-app-stack
  sourcePath: /var/www/html/index.html
---
apiVersion: compute.cnrm.cloud.google.com/v1beta1
kind: ComputeDisk
metadata:
  name: disk-for-app-stack # Change to your preferred name prefix
spec:
  zone: europe-west3-a # Change to your preferred zone
  sourceImage:
    kind: compute.cnrm.cloud.google.com/ComputeImage
    name: image-for-app-stack
  type: pd-ssd
  sizeGb: 100
---
apiVersion: compute.cnrm.cloud.google.com/v1beta1
kind: ComputeImage
metadata:
  name: image-for-app-stack # Change to your preferred name prefix
spec:
  sourceDiskRef:
    kind: compute.cnrm.cloud.google.com/ComputeDisk
    name: disk-for-app-stack
---
